fromSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM mt_sc_request WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId}

description: Count of reviews in pending status
fromSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM mt_sc_review WHERE sc_rev_status = 'pending' AND tenant_id = #{params.tenantId}

description: Count of tasks in assigned or in_progress status
fromSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM mt_sc_task WHERE sc_task_status IN ('assigned', 'in_progress') AND tenant_id = #{params.tenantId}

description: Count of non-completed tasks past due date
fromSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM mt_sc_task WHERE sc_task_status IN ('pending_assignment', 'assigned', 'in_progress') AND sc_task_due_date < CURRENT_DATE AND tenant_id = #{params.tenantId}
SELECT sc_req_status as status, COUNT(*) as count FROM mt_sc_request WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} GROUP BY sc_req_status
SELECT sc_req_priority as priority, COUNT(*) as count FROM mt_sc_request WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} GROUP BY sc_req_priority
SELECT date_trunc('week', created_at)::date as week, COUNT(*) as count FROM mt_sc_request WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
